name: bluez-test-scripts
title: bluez-test-scripts
description:
test scripts of bluez
This package contains test scripts for using BlueZ.
.
BlueZ is the official Linux Bluetooth protocol stack. It is an Open Source
project distributed under GNU General Public License (GPL).
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use bluez-test-scripts because test scripts of bluez.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use bluez-test-scripts as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair bluez-test-scripts with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `bluez-test-scripts --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
